tool.name: github_search_repos
tool.description: Search GitHub repositories by query. Returns repos with name, description, stars, forks, and language.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query (e.g. 'machine learning python', 'react component library')

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort by: 'stars', 'forks', 'updated', or '' for best match (default: '')
